name: Venus Flytrap
description: Plant that generates animal-like action potentials — electrical signals propagating at 10 cm/s trigger snap closure in 100 milliseconds. Counting mechanism requires two trigger hair touches within 20 seconds to fire, preventing false positives. Digestive glands activate on the fifth signal. A plant that counts, remembers, and decides.

core_attributes.pattern: action potential generation, touch-counting memory, rapid mechanical response
